stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying from SALCO to BERRY HEAD on Magnetic Track 007°. At 10:00 UTC the relative bearing of locator PY is 311°. At 10:03 UTC the relative bearing of locator PY is 266°. Calculate the true bearing of locator PY at 10:03 UTC from the aircraft, given that:

TAS: 445 kt
W/V: 050°(T)/40 kt
Variation: 5°W
Deviation: +2°
